subcodes.title: Words to some friends, spoken on 1913-03-29
subcodes.first_line: I am under the protection and preservation of God. God looks after me. He guards me against any danger. Sometimes He comes and caresses me. He kisses my lips and touches my back.
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @love of God, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @consolation and comfort, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
